artPrompt: A juvenile sludge kaiju charges through the toxic reservoir shallows, lean and snarling, runoff and litter sheeting off its mutated hide as sickly bioluminescence flickers along its spine, already monstrous despite its youth. Crumbling pipes and a bruised stormy sky blur behind in motion. Dynamic low film-still angle of hasty, trampling menace, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Reservoir Kaiju, Juvenile
text:
Trample, haste
Feed (Whenever a player rolls one or more dice, flips one or more coins, or votes, put a sludge counter on this creature.)
Reservoir Kaiju, Juvenile gets +2/+2 for each sludge counter on it.
When it dies, it deals damage equal to its toughness to each opponent. Even half-grown, it takes the neighborhood with it.
flavorText: And this is the small one. There is, the marine biologist confirmed before resigning, a bigger one.
